_note: Channel manifest for recursive.eco. Makes this repo self-describing: recursive.eco imports it as a channel by reading this file from raw.githubusercontent.com/PlayfulProcess/Recursive-astrology/<default_branch>/recursive-eco.json. Declares the channel identity (rendered as a channel-document, document_data.is_channel=true), where its grammars live (grammars/<slug>/grammar.json), and the slug->UUID map (ids.json). Mirrors recursive-tarot/recursive-eco.json and nara/recursive-eco.json. See recursive-eco/docs/DESIGN-import-channel-from-github.md.

channel.name: The Recursive Astrology
channel.description: The open library of astrology's history — the eras and stances through which humans have read meaning into the sky, held honestly to the record. Public-domain voice libraries, scholarship-grounded dossiers, and chart-aspect castings. A chart is a mirror and a calendar, never a command.

hero.title: The Recursive Astrology
hero.subtitle: Read the sky to know yourself, not to be told your fate — five thousand years of meaning-making, held to the record.
hero.body_md:
Every era here speaks in its own terms and is held honestly to the historical record — Babylonian omen-craft to the modern controlled test. The voice libraries are public domain (Ptolemy in the 1822 Ashmand translation, Alan Leo, the Victorian skeptics); every load-bearing claim is cited in the research dossiers.

A chart is a mirror and a calendar, not a command: castings here reflect aspects of your own chart back to you — never a random draw, never a prediction. Built in the open and bound to its GitHub repo — fork it, correct it, or reflect with it.

grammars._exclude_note: Nothing excluded yet. The casting-* grammars are spread-grammars (positions, not interpretations) — the app's oracle reads them as castings per recursive-eco/docs/future_plan/DESIGN-oracle-app-spreads-as-grammars.md; they still import as channel members.
